title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS library for downloading, running & chatting with GGUF models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client (PyPI: ollama) wrapping the Ollama REST API for embeddings, chat and pull.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client (npm: ollama) for Node & browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration (PyPI: langchain-ollama) exposing Ollama models as LLM & embeddings.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-like web UI for Ollama with multi-user, RAG, OpenAI-compat endpoints.

title: ollama-cli (sugarforever/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive terminal UI (Node/npm) for browsing/pulling/chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot (jmorganca/ollama-copilot)
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Minimal Python repo showing retrieval-augmented generation with Ollama + sentence-transformers.

title: ollama-discord (nickwinn/ollama-discord)
summary: Self-host Discord bot (npm) that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-helm (otwld/ollama-helm)
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama server on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-swift (kevinhermawan/OllamaSwift)
summary: Swift Package Manager library providing async/await wrappers for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/Kotlin client (Maven Central) for Ollama with fluent API and reactive extensions.

title: ollama-nim (yetanotherco/ollama-nim)
summary: Nim language client for Ollama with async HTTP and native SSE parsing.

title: ollama-rust (pepperoni21/ollama-rust)
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama’s chat, embed and pull endpoints.

title: ollama-csharp (awaescher/OllamaSharp)
summary: .NET library (NuGet) exposing Ollama via Dependency Injection with streaming chat support.

title: ollama-obsidian (joethei/obsidian-ollama)
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds local AI commands (summarize, rewrite, translate) powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai/haystack-ollama)
summary: Haystack integration (PyPI: haystack-ollama) using Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-slack (tfriedel/ollama-slack)
summary: Lightweight Python Slack bot that proxies channel messages to Ollama and posts replies.

title: ollama-llamaindex (run-llama/llama_index)
summary: LlamaIndex LLM & embedding drivers (PyPI: llama-index-llms-ollama) for retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger (dagger/dagger)
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.
